name: Gotta Go Soup
recipeIngredient: Leftover vegetables (broccoli, cabbage, carrot, green beans, potatoes, etc.)
My Seasoning (1 part garlic powder, 1 part onion powder, 1/2 part ground black pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. If you do not have enough leftover vegetables, add a package of frozen mixed vegetables.
2. Combine any bits of leftover vegetables (broccoli, cabbage, carrot, green beans, potatoes, etc.), leftover salad (the dressing adds flavor), and enough chicken broth to cover the ingredients.
3. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
5. Puree the soup in a blender or food processor, adding more chicken broth or water if necessary to thin the soup.
6. Return to the saucepan and season to taste with My Seasoning, Tabasco sauce, and herbs.
7. If desired, add 1/2 - 1 cup of heavy cream.
8. Serve hot. Garnish with a tablespoon of dry sherry for company.
